testcase.name: ingest sets name and servings to null()
extractInstructions returns flat string wrapped in list()
ingest throws ScrapingException for unreachable http URL()
ingest filters blank lines and trims whitespace()
ingest routes to text path when input does not start with http()
ingest passes full raw text as instructions()
extractInstructions expands HowToSection into section name followed by its steps()
extractInstructions returns empty list for null input()
extractInstructions drops HowToSection with no itemListElement()
extractInstructions handles flat list of HowToStep maps()
